title: sparkle.shift.swapped
description: Emitted when a manager approves a shift trade between two employees.

proposalId.description: UUID of the ShiftTradeProposal that was approved.

shift1Id.description: UUID of the shift offered by the proposer.

employee1Id.description: UUID of the proposer (original owner of shift1).

shift2Id.description: UUID of the shift offered in return by the responder.

employee2Id.description: UUID of the responder (original owner of shift2).
